title: Onboarding Playbook
objective: Onboard new services and MCPs using closed JSON contracts only.
trigger_conditions: A new governed service is introduced.
A new core MCP contract is introduced.
execution_steps: Create services/<service-id>/ using the JSON service contract bundle template.
Register the service in control/registry/services.v0.1.json and add policy/allowlist/SLO files.
Create control/mcps/<mcp-id>/ with manifest, contract bundle, and runtime binding.
Register the MCP in control/registry/mcps.v0.1.json and map capabilities plus approval tier.
rollback_condition: Registry and file layout drift from the fixed JSON shape.
Capabilities or approval mapping are incomplete.
